name: Nebula
text: Combat Protocols - Forced Response: After your turn begins, resolve the "Special" ability on each [[technique]] upgrade you control, then discard each [[technique]] upgrade resolved this way.
real_text: Combat Protocols - Forced Response: After your turn begins, resolve the "Special" ability on each [[technique]] upgrade you control, then discard each [[technique]] upgrade resolved this way.

linked_card.name: Nebula
linked_card.text: Cybernetic Upgrades - Response: After you play a technique upgrade, draw 2 cards. (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.real_text: Cybernetic Upgrades - Response: After you play a [[technique]] upgrade, draw 2 cards. (Limit once per round.)
linked_card.flavor: "Thanos built me for one purpose: To kill. In time, he will regret that."

name: Gamora
text: Response: After you play Gamora, choose a [[technique]] upgrade you control, then resolve its "Special" ability.
real_text: Response: After you play Gamora, choose a [[technique]] upgrade you control, then resolve its "Special" ability.
flavor: "Thanos trained us both for the same purpose."

name: Nebula's Ship
text: Resource: Exhaust Nebula's Ship → generate a [wild] resource.
real_text: Resource: Exhaust Nebula's Ship → generate a [wild] resource.
flavor: "I liked it better when I was the one targeting your ship." —Gamora

name: Cutthroat Ambition
text: While Nebula is in hero form, her attacks gain piercing and overkill. Special (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme.
real_text: While Nebula is in hero form, her attacks gain piercing and overkill. Special (thwart): Remove 3 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "I am every bit the warrior you are!" —Nebula

name: Evasive Maneuvering
text: While in hero form, Nebula ignores the guard keyword, the patrol keyword, and the crisis icon. Special : Choose to either stun or confuse an enemy.
real_text: While in hero form, Nebula ignores the guard keyword, the patrol keyword, and the crisis icon. Special : Choose to either stun or confuse an enemy.

name: Unyielding Persistence
text: While in hero form, Nebula gets +1 THW, +1 ATK, and gains stalwart. Special : Give Nebula a tough status card.
real_text: While in hero form, Nebula gets +1 THW, +1 ATK, and gains stalwart. Special : Give Nebula a tough status card.

name: Weapons Master
text: While in hero form, Nebula gains retaliate 1. Special (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy.
real_text: While in hero form, Nebula gains retaliate 1. Special (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy.

name: Wide Stance
text: While Nebula is in hero form, reduce the amount of damage she takes from each attack by 1. Special : Look at the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Discard 1 and put the others back in any order.
real_text: While Nebula is in hero form, reduce the amount of damage she takes from each attack by 1. Special : Look at the top 3 cards of the encounter deck. Discard 1 and put the others back in any order.

name: Combat Ready
text: Alter-Ego Action: Choose one: Shuffle up to 2 [[technique]] upgrades from your discard pile into your deck. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a [[technique]] upgrade. Put that upgrade into play, then resolve its "Special" ability.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Choose one: Shuffle up to 2 [[technique]] upgrades from your discard pile into your deck. Discard cards from the top of your deck until you discard a [[technique]] upgrade. Put that upgrade into play, then resolve its "Special" ability.

name: Lethal Intent
text: Hero Action: Choose up to X [[technique]] upgrades you control. Resolve each of their "Special" abilities (in the order of your choice).
real_text: Hero Action: Choose up to X [[technique]] upgrades you control. Resolve each of their "Special" abilities (in the order of your choice).
flavor: "The Guardians were wise to fear me, and even smarter to hire me on." —Nebula

name: Eros
text: Response: After you play Eros from your hand, confuse a minion for each [mental] resource you used to pay for him.
real_text: Response: After you play Eros from your hand, confuse a minion for each [mental] resource you used to pay for him.
flavor: "This will not be easy, but we will save this universe...we will guard this galaxy."

name: Wraith
text: Hero Interrupt: When a boost card is turned faceup, exhaust Wraith and deal 1 damage to him → cancel that card's "Boost" effect.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When a boost card is turned faceup, exhaust Wraith and deal 1 damage to him → cancel that card's "Boost" effect.
flavor: "Do not despair: Destiny makes slaves of us all."

name: Venom
text: While there is no threat on the main scheme, reduce all consequential damage Venom takes by 1.
real_text: While there is no threat on the main scheme, reduce all consequential damage Venom takes by 1.
flavor: "So much for doing this the easy way."

name: Justice Served
text: Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After you thwart and remove the last threat from a scheme, discard Justice Served → ready your hero.
real_text: Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After you thwart and remove the last threat from a scheme, discard Justice Served → ready your hero.

name: One Way or Another
text: Max 1 per round. Hero Action: Search the encounter deck for a side scheme. Reveal that side scheme → draw 3 cards (shuffle the encounter deck).
real_text: Max 1 per round. Hero Action: Search the encounter deck for a side scheme. Reveal that side scheme → draw 3 cards (shuffle the encounter deck).

name: Determination
text: Max 1 per deck. Hero Response: After you spend this card, remove 1 threat from the main scheme.
real_text: Max 1 per deck. Hero Response: After you spend this card, remove 1 threat from the main scheme.

name: The Power of Justice
text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Justice (yellow) card.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Justice (yellow) card.

name: Brains Over Brawn
text: Hero Response (attack): After your hero makes a basic thwart, deal damage to an enemy equal to your hero's THW.
real_text: Hero Response (attack): After your hero makes a basic thwart, deal damage to an enemy equal to your hero's THW.
flavor: Despite his incredible strength, Spider-Man often triumphs by outwitting his foes.

name: Heroic Intuition
text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 THW.
real_text:
Play under any player's control. Max 1 per player.
Your hero gets +1 THW.

name: Cosmo
text: Interrupt: When Cosmo attacks or thwarts, name a card type, then discard the top card of a player deck or the encounter deck. If that card is of the named type, Cosmo does not take consequential damage for this use.
real_text: Interrupt: When Cosmo attacks or thwarts, name a card type, then discard the top card of a player deck or the encounter deck. If that card is of the named type, Cosmo does not take consequential damage for this use.
errata: Changed “a deck” to “a player deck or the encounter deck”. Removed reminder text. (RRG 1.5)

name: Knowhere
text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After a player plays a [[guardian]] ally, exhaust Knowhere → that player draws 1 card.
real_text: Play only if your identity has the [[guardian]] trait. Increase your ally limit by 1. Response: After a player plays a [[guardian]] ally, exhaust Knowhere → that player draws 1 card.

name: Daughters of Thanos
text: Team-Up (Gamora and Nebula). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Draw 3 cards.
real_text: Team-Up (Gamora and Nebula). Max 1 per deck. Hero Action: Draw 3 cards.
flavor: "Thanos pitted us against each other as children, but now we are sisters. United at last." —Gamora

name: First Aid
text: Action: Heal 2 damage from any character.
real_text: Action: Heal 2 damage from any character.
flavor: "Does it still qualify as first aid if it's your second day in the hospital?" —Clint Barton

text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

text: Max 1 per deck.
real_text: Max 1 per deck.

name: Inferiority Complex
text: Give to Nebula player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter-ego → remove Inferiority Complex from the game. • Choose and discard 2 [[Technique]] upgrades you control. If no upgrade was discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to Nebula player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust your alter-ego → remove Inferiority Complex from the game. • Choose and discard 2 [[Technique]] upgrades you control. If no upgrade was discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

name: Gamora
text: Forced Interrupt: When this minion would enter play, discard the Gamora ally from play. [star] Forced Response: After Gamora attacks and damages you, choose and discard an upgrade you control. (Nebula's nemesis minion.)
real_text: Forced Interrupt: When this minion would enter play, discard the Gamora ally from play. [star] Forced Response: After Gamora attacks and damages you, choose and discard an upgrade you control. (Nebula's nemesis minion.)

name: Self-Preservation
text:
Nebula gets -1 THW, -1 ATK, and -1 DEF.
Gamora gets +1 ATK and her attacks gain piercing.
real_text:
Nebula gets -1 THW, -1 ATK, and -1 DEF.
Gamora gets +1 ATK and her attacks gain piercing.

name: Lethal Weapon
text: Attach to Gamora. If you cannot, attach to the villain. Hero Action: Discard an upgrade you control → discard this attachment.
real_text: Attach to Gamora. If you cannot, attach to the villain. Hero Action: Discard an upgrade you control → discard this attachment.
flavor: "There's only one 'Most Dangerous Woman in the Galaxy', and that's me!" —Gamora

name: Old Rivals
text: When Revealed: Gamora attacks you. If the Gamora hero or ally is in play, she attacks you (resolve her ATK against you without exhausting her). If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.
real_text: When Revealed: Gamora attacks you. If the Gamora hero or ally is in play, she attacks you (resolve her ATK against you without exhausting her). If no attack was made this way, this card gains surge.
